sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73287" key="o(losth/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλο-στήμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n73287.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consisting all of warp-threads,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ταινία</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.32</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
